ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG. 19, 2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IN DEPT. 220. NO OPPOSITION FILED, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PER TENTATIVE RULINGS: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE UNDER CCP 36(A) IS GRANTED, TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR NOVEMBER 29, 2010 AT 11:15 IN DEPARTMENT 220. SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS MAY BE FILED UPON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITH NO ADDITIONAL DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. LAST DAY FOR HEARING OF SUMMARY MOTIONS IS NOV. 18, 2010. PLAINTIFFS WILL MAKE DEMANDS ON ALL DEFENDANTS BY NOV. 15, 2010. ALL EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL REMAIN PURSUANT TO G.O. #140. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE HELD IN ROOM 603 ON NOV. 18, 2010 AT 9:00 AM. DISCOVERY REMAIN OPEN UNTIL THE TRIAL DATE OF NOV. 29, 2010. ORDER SINGED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HAROLD. E. KAHN, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED.(220)
